title: Workhorse Group Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results

Publication Date: August 20, 2024

Key Highlights

Workhorse Group (Nasdaq: WKHS) announced Q2 2024 financial results, reporting sales of $0.8 million compared to $4.0 million in the prior year period.

CEO Rick Dauch stated: We successfully executed field demonstrations with multiple national fleets, secured new dealer partnerships and advanced our electric vehicle product roadmap during the quarter.

Financial Performance

Net Loss: $26.3 million (Q2 2024) vs. $23.0 million (Q2 2023). Cash Position: $5.3 million as of June 30, 2024. Inventory: $46.5 million (net). Accounts Payable: $10.5 million.

Strategic Actions

The company completed the divestiture of its Aero business, achieved approximately $0.4 million in monthly cost savings, and regained NASDAQ minimum bid price compliance following a 1-for-20 reverse stock split effective June 17, 2024.

Workhorse received a purchase order for 141 W4 CC vehicles and expects to launch new products including a 208-inch wheelbase W56 step van with 1,200 cubic feet capacity by year-end 2024.
